name: torch2.4.0-cu121 + mmcv2.2.0 (py3.11, ubuntu22.04)
postCreateCommand:
python3.11 -m pip install -U pip && \
python3.11 -m pip install --no-cache-dir --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu121 torch==2.4.0 torchvision && \
python3.11 -m pip install --no-cache-dir -f https://download.openmmlab.com/mmcv/dist/cu121/torch2.4/index.html mmcv==2.2.0 && \
python3.11 -m pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt

name: torch2.4.0-cu121 + mmcv2.2.0 (py3.11, ubuntu22.04)
postCreateCommand: python3.11 -m pip install -U pip && python3.11 -m pip install --no-cache-dir --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu121 torch==2.4.0 torchvision && python3.11 -m pip install --no-cache-dir -f https://download.openmmlab.com/mmcv/dist/cu121/torch2.4/index.html mmcv==2.2.0 && if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then python3.11 -m pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt; fi
